name: Resend
description: Resend provides a REST API for programmatic access to its features. Use it to automate workflows and integrate with other services.

capabilities.name: emails
capabilities.description: Manage emails — send an email, trigger up to 100 batch emails at once, cancel the schedule of the e-mail. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: receiving_emails
capabilities.description: Manage receiving emails — retrieve a list of received emails, retrieve a single received email, retrieve a list of attachments for a received email. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: domains
capabilities.description: Manage domains — create a new domain, verify an existing domain, retrieve a list of domains. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: api_keys
capabilities.description: Manage api keys — create a new api key, retrieve a list of api keys, remove an existing api key. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: templates
capabilities.description: Manage templates — create a template, publish a template, duplicate a template. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: contacts
capabilities.description: Manage contacts — create a new contact, add a contact to a segment, retrieve a list of contacts. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: broadcasts
capabilities.description: Manage broadcasts — create a broadcast, send or schedule a broadcast, retrieve a list of broadcasts. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: webhooks
capabilities.description: Manage webhooks — create a new webhook, retrieve a list of webhooks, retrieve a single webhook. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: segments
capabilities.description: Manage segments — create a new segment, retrieve a list of segments, retrieve a single segment. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: topics
capabilities.description: Manage topics — create a new topic, retrieve a list of topics, retrieve a single topic. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: contact_properties
capabilities.description: Manage contact properties — create a new contact property, retrieve a list of contact properties, retrieve a single contact property. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
